zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Morton於1328年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾比可萊頓時，他的父親Sir William de Moton Knight of Peckleton28歲，母親Joan Inge30歲。他於1353年1月與Alice Basset結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1367年7月19日在他的家鄉享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Morton于1328年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾比可萊頓时，他的父亲Sir William de Moton Knight of Peckleton28岁，母亲Joan Inge30岁。他于1353年1月与Alice Basset结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1367年7月19日在他的家乡享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Morton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of the many places called Mor(e)ton, named with Old English mōr ‘moor’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with Morten , and perhaps also with Murton . This English name has also been established in Ireland since the 13th century.
American shortened and altered form of Swedish Mårtensson or Mortensson (see Martenson and Mortenson ), which could also be substituted for the Finnish cognate Marttinen.

variants.name: Moreton
meanings: French: nickname from a double diminutive of   More   2 ‘Moor’. Compare   Moret  .

variants.name: Murton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places in northern England, all named in Old English as ‘settlement or enclosure at the marsh or moor’, from mōr ‘marsh, fen, moor’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. There has been considerable confusion with both Morton and Merton .

variants.name: Morten
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortagne in La Manche, France. This surname has probably been confused with   Morton  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Morton was born in 1328, in Peckleton, Leicestershire, England, his father, Sir William de Moton Knight of Peckleton, was 28 and his mother, Joan Inge, was 30. He married Alice Basset in January 1353. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 19 July 1367, in his hometown, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Morton est né en 1328, à Peckleton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Moton Knight of Peckleton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan Inge, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Alice Basset en janvier 1353. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 19 juillet 1367, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Morton 1328 in Peckleton, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Moton Knight of Peckleton 28 und seine Mutter Joan Inge 30. Er hat im Januar 1353 Alice Basset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 19. Juli 1367 im Alter von 39 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Morton è nato il nel 1328 nel Peckleton, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir William de Moton Knight of Peckleton, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Joan Inge, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Alice Basset nel gennaio 1353. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 luglio 1367, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Mortonが1328年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアペックレトンで生まれた時，父Sir William de Moton Knight of Peckletonは28歳，母Joan Ingeは30歳であった。1353年1月にAlice Bassetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1367年7月19日に故郷で39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Morton(이)가 1328년 영국 레이스스터실르 펙레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Moton Knight of Peckleton(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Inge(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1353년 1월 Alice Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1367년 7월 19일 그의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Morton nasceu em 1328, em Peckleton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Moton Knight of Peckleton, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan Inge, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Basset em janeiro de 1353. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 19 de julho de 1367, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Morton родился в 1328 г. в местности пекклетон, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Moton Knight of Peckleton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Inge, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Basset январь 1353 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 19 июля 1367 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Morton nació en 1328, en Peckleton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Moton Knight of Peckleton, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joan Inge, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Alice Basset en enero de 1353. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 19 de julio de 1367, en su pueblo, a la edad de 39 años.
